product_description: High-quality steel claw hammer with comfortable fiberglass handle, perfect for framing and general construction work.
Classic ball peen hammer for metalworking, riveting, and shaping metal with hardened striking surfaces.
Lightweight finishing hammer with smooth face for trim work and delicate construction tasks.
Heavy-duty sledge hammer for demolition, driving stakes, and breaking concrete with steel handle.
Complete Phillips head screwdriver set with magnetic tips and comfortable cushion grips in multiple sizes.
Professional flathead screwdrivers with precision-machined tips and ergonomic handles for various applications.
Micro precision screwdriver set for electronics, eyeglasses, and small appliance repair work.
Electrician's insulated screwdrivers rated for 1000V with dual-material handles for electrical safety.
Professional cordless drill with lithium-ion battery, variable speed control, and LED work light.
Corded hammer drill with percussion action for drilling into concrete and masonry materials.
Compact right-angle drill for tight spaces with 3/8-inch chuck and reversible motor.
High-torque impact drill with brushless motor for efficient drilling and driving applications.
Stationary drill press with adjustable table and depth stop for precision drilling operations.
Powerful circular saw with carbide-tipped blade for cutting lumber and sheet materials.
Battery-powered circular saw with lightweight design and laser guide for portable cutting.
Heavy-duty worm drive saw with superior torque for demanding construction applications.
High-quality flat interior paint with excellent coverage and hide, perfect for ceilings and low-traffic areas.
Durable eggshell finish paint with subtle sheen, ideal for living rooms and bedrooms with easy cleanup.
Washable semi-gloss interior paint for kitchens, bathrooms, and trim work with moisture resistance.
Environmentally friendly zero-VOC paint for healthy indoor air quality in all living spaces.
High-hide one-coat paint formula that covers most colors in a single application for time savings.
Weather-resistant exterior paint with satin finish for siding, trim, and outdoor surfaces.
Premium acrylic exterior paint with fade resistance and superior adhesion for long-lasting protection.
All-in-one primer and paint system for bare wood and previously painted exterior surfaces.
Comprehensive collection of wood screws in various lengths from 1/2-inch to 3-inch with Phillips and Robertson drives.
Fine-thread drywall screws with sharp points for quick penetration and secure attachment to metal studs.
Exterior-rated deck screws with corrosion-resistant coating for outdoor construction projects.
Precision machine screws with hex, Phillips, and slotted drives in metric and standard thread pitches.
Hardened self-tapping screws for metal applications with drilling and threading action in one step.
Traditional common nails from 6d to 16d for general construction and framing applications.
